node_1.description: Your journey begins here. Purchase this to open all four branches of the skill tree. Grants 10% more gold from all sources. Notice the emoticon icon (emoji). Secondary badge 'TUT' marks tutorial completion.
node_1.name: Merchant's Start

node_10.description: Doubles the power of every click (2x multiplier). Locked behind a gold (maxed) arrow from Quick Fingers — you must fully max Quick Fingers before this unlocks.
node_10.name: Gold Rush

node_11.description: Set things in motion automatically. Enables auto-click functionality. Gateway to the PRODUCTION branch — purchase to unlock both Speed Demon and Factory Floor. Uses a gear emoticon.
node_11.name: Idle Hands

node_12.description: Faster idle generation. Adds 10% idle speed per rank. Flat cost increase of 200 per rank (ranks cost 400, 600, 800, 1000, 1200). Unlocks Rapid Idle when purchased at any rank.
node_12.name: Speed Demon

node_13.description: Idle systems reach peak efficiency — +50% idle speed in a single skill. Requires Speed Demon purchased at any rank (green arrow). Uses a rocket emoticon for flair.
node_13.name: Rapid Idle

node_14.description: Build a factory to spawn resources 25% faster. Uses an SVG icon from the plugin's own asset folder to demonstrate image path support (res:// path in emoticon field).
node_14.name: Factory Floor

node_15.description: Each rank adds one extra resource per spawn cycle. Cost increase of 500 per rank. Max all 3 ranks to unlock Merge Master via a gold (maxed) arrow.
node_15.name: Assembly Line

node_16.description: Assembly Line must be fully maxed to unlock this via gold arrow. Merged items are worth double (2x merge value). Grants the PRODUCTION_EXPERT secondary unlock badge.
node_16.name: Merge Master

node_17.description: Learn the basics of combat. Adds 5% critical hit chance. Gateway to the COMBAT branch — purchase to unlock Critical Eye I and Critical Strike simultaneously.
node_17.name: Combat Training

node_18.description: Rank 1 of the Critical Eye rank-up chain. Adds 3% crit rate per rank. Cost increases by 250 per rank. Max all 3 ranks to rank up to Critical Eye II via blue (rank_up) arrow.
node_18.name: Critical Eye I

node_19.description: Rank 2 of the Critical Eye chain. Adds 5% crit rate per rank (stronger than Rank 1). Rank-up child of Critical Eye I — inherits the CRIT_RATE effect automatically.
node_19.name: Critical Eye II

node_2.description: A larger purse means more coins to carry. Each rank adds 15% gold gain. Cost increases by 50 per rank (flat increase). Max 3 ranks. Unlocks Market Stall and Quick Sale.
node_2.name: Coin Purse

node_20.description: Rank 3: The peak of critical precision. Adds 8% crit rate per rank. Final rank in this chain. Grants COMBAT_MASTERY secondary. Cost increase of 2000 makes maxing this a major commitment.
node_20.name: Critical Eye III

node_21.description: Make crits hit harder — +10% crit damage per rank. EXPONENTIAL + flat increase combined: costs scale very steeply. Max all 5 to unlock Chain Reaction via gold (maxed) arrow.
node_21.name: Critical Strike

node_22.description: Critical Strike must be fully maxed to unlock this. Attacks chain to 2 additional nearby targets. Unlocks Combo Expert when purchased (green arrow). Shares the lightning emoticon.
node_22.name: Chain Reaction

node_23.description: Build up combos to amplify damage — +5% combo bonus per rank. Fixed cost per rank (no increase, no exponential). Max all 5 to unlock Area Sweep via gold (maxed) arrow.
node_23.name: Combo Expert

node_24.description: Max Combo Expert to unlock via gold arrow: attacks affect a 1.5x larger area. Capstone of the Combat branch. Uses an SVG icon. Grants COMBAT_MASTERY secondary when purchased.
node_24.name: Area Sweep

node_25.description: Begin your education and earn 10% more XP from all activities. Gateway to the PROGRESSION and DROP branches — purchase to unlock Quick Study and Loot Sense.
node_25.name: Student's Path

node_26.description: Absorb knowledge faster — +5% leveling speed per rank. Cost increases by 125 per rank. MAX this skill (gold arrow required) to unlock Bargain Hunter; just purchasing it is not enough.
node_26.name: Quick Study

node_27.description: All upgrades cost 10% less — a strong investment that pays for itself over time. Requires Quick Study to be FULLY MAXED (gold arrow). Uses a tag emoticon and no secondary.
node_27.name: Bargain Hunter

node_28.description: You develop a nose for treasure — +15% item drop rate. In the DROP group (different color from PROGRESSION neighbors). Unlocks Treasure Hunter when purchased.
node_28.name: Loot Sense

node_29.description: Seek out higher-quality loot — +10% drop quality per rank. Cost increases by 750 per rank. Max all 3 ranks to unlock Night Owl via gold (maxed) arrow.
node_29.name: Treasure Hunter

node_3.description: Open a market stall and multiply all earnings by 1.5x. Requires Coin Purse to be purchased (green arrow). Max this single-rank node to unlock Wholesale Deal via the gold (maxed) arrow.
node_3.name: Market Stall

node_30.description: Earn 50% of active income even while offline. Requires Treasure Hunter fully maxed. Capstone of the DROP branch. Uses a load-game SVG icon. Grants PRESTIGE_UNLOCK secondary.
node_30.name: Night Owl

node_4.description: Bulk pricing means bigger profits. Adds 20% gold multiplier per rank. EXPONENTIAL costs — each rank costs significantly more than the last even without cost_increase. Uses a project icon as its display image (res:// path in the emoticon field). Grants PRESTIGE_UNLOCK secondary.
node_4.name: Wholesale Deal

node_5.description: Speed up transactions and add 25% more power to each manual click. No icon, no secondary — a plain single-rank utility node. Requires Coin Purse purchased.
node_5.name: Quick Sale

node_6.description: Train your clicking speed. Adds 20% click power per rank. Cost increases by 75 per rank. Max this out (gold arrow) to unlock Gold Rush; purchase it (green arrow) to unlock Click Power I.
node_6.name: Quick Fingers

node_7.description: Rank 1 of the Click Power rank-up chain. Grants +50% click strength. Rank-up arrows (blue) connect this to Click Power II — max this node to promote it to the next rank.
node_7.name: Click Power I

node_8.description: Rank 2: Clicks hit much harder — +100% click strength. Rank-up child of Click Power I, meaning Click Power I must be maxed to unlock this. Inherits CLICK_POWER effect from its parent.
node_8.name: Click Power II

node_9.description: Rank 3: Maximum clicking potential — +200% click strength. Final rank in the Click Power chain. Grants COMBAT_MASTERY secondary when purchased. Uses a lightning emoticon.
node_9.name: Click Power III
